raw_response_text:
<explanation>
The query image shows bright pink/magenta flowers with long, thin stamens protruding from the center, surrounded by dark green leaves. This visual pattern matches the first example (label 71), which also features pink flowers with prominent stamens and similar foliage.
</explanation>

<response>71</response>

</explanation>

<response>33</response>
